title: OpenAI 准备发布"Bidi 1"新语音模型
full_text:
🚨 AI News | TestingCatalog on X: "BREAKING 🔥: OpenAI is preparing "Bidi 1" for the upcoming web release!
> A new voice model will be available in settings, alongside standard and advanced options.
> Voice mode bubble will have a Yellow color instead of blue.
How soon? 👀 https://t.co/WlfydBsHy9" / X
